mapper.sql: em.employee_id, em.name, em.name_kana, em.gender, em.department_id, d.name AS department_name
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM employee_master em LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.id = em.department_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE em.deleted_at IS NULL AND em.status = 1
AND (em.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR em.employee_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY em.employee_id ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT
FROM employee_master em LEFT JOIN departments d ON d.id = em.department_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE em.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND em.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT em.id, em.employee_id, em.name, em.name_kana, em.gender, em.department_id, em.status, em.created_at, em.updated_at, em.deleted_at FROM employee_master em WHERE em.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND em.deleted_at IS NULL
